Effect: Gain 12% Armor. This effect doubles for 10s after the start of battle.
Basic Attack DMG increases by 15%.
For each defeated unit on both sides, increases DMG dealt by 3%, up to 18%.
Gain 12% Attack SPD. The effect doubles when attacking opponents with less than 50% Health.
Regenerate 1 Energy/s.
Upon using a Basic Attack, gain 1% ATK and Attack SPD, up to 15%.
For each hex traveled through movement or displacement, gain a 4% DMG Bonus, up to 24%.
Gain 30% outgoing Heal Amp.
When participating in defeating an opponent, heal itself for 3% Max Health. When defeating an opponent, the Healing increases to 5%.
Gain full Energy at the start of battle.
When participating in defeating an opponent, regenerate 5 Energy to itself and the defeating unit.
Gain 12% MR. The effect doubles for 10s after the start of battle.
Increases DMG dealt to opponents with the Blaster or Mastermind Trait by 15%.
Attack SPD increases by 20% while Shielded.
When Controlling an opponent for the first time, deal bonus Magic DMG equal to 5% of the target's Max Health.
Gain 10% ATK. This effect doubles when Health is above 50%.
Gain 10% MP. This effect doubles when Health is above 50%.
Gain 30% outgoing Shield Amp.
Increase the first Skill DMG by 60%.
After being defeated, restore Health equal to 7% Max Health to all allied units.
Upon taking DMG, gain 1% Armor and MR, up to 20%.
Increases Max Health by 8%. When Health drops below 50% for the first time, increase it by an additional 8%.
Increases DMG dealt to opponents with the Protector Trait by 15%.
Restore 8% missing Health every 3s.
Gain 10% Omnileech. The effect doubles the first time Health drops below 50%.
While the Disposition owner is alive, all allied units gain 8% Attack SPD.
When battle starts, gain Shield equal to 40% Max Health that decays over 6s.
